# Support

## When to open an issue

Use GitHub issues for:

- reproducible bugs
- documentation errors or gaps
- framework-level feature requests for this repository

Before opening a feature request, check ROADMAP.md and TODO.md.

## Contact paths

Use the public GitHub issue tracker for normal project questions, bugs, and feature requests.

Use a private contact path only for sensitive topics:

- email: 7260230+apajon@users.noreply.github.com
- GitHub private vulnerability reporting, if it is enabled for this repository

For security issues, follow SECURITY.md rather than opening a public issue.

## What does not belong here

This repository is for the core library. Domain-specific application code, multi-node systems, and example-heavy workflows may belong in a separate application or examples repository.

## Project status

This project is currently in the 0.x series and should be treated as beta software. Public APIs are stable in intent, but changes may still happen before 1.0.

## Response expectations

Support is provided on a best-effort basis. There is no guaranteed response time.
